name: Kolcraft Fresh Start Polyfoam Crib And Toddler Mattress
description:
The Kolcraft Fresh Start PolyFoam Crib Mattress is a lightweight foam crib mattress with an easy clean, waterproof cover. Quality-tested for a healthy night's sleep and proudly made in the USA!

-Lightweight foam-core provides optimal firmness for your baby
-Lightweight making it easy to change sheets
-Square corner design provides snug fit in cribs
-Embossed cover is waterproof and cleans easily
-Meets or exceeds all flammability, lead, phthalate and CPSIA testing and does not contain toxic fire retardants
-GREENGUARD® Gold Certified: This entire mattress is GREENGUARD® Gold certified for indoor air quality and low chemical emissions to help create a healthier sleeping environment for your baby
-Proudly made in the USA of U.S. and imported parts

All New Material Consisting of 
100% Polyester Fiber Batting
Reg No 
PA 23169(NC)
Certification
